prompt: Add JWT token refresh functionality with automatic refresh before expiration

turns.content:
<task>
Add JWT token refresh functionality with automatic refresh before expiration
</task>

arguments.summary: Read AuthClient with login and getAccessToken. Has TokenPair with expiresAt but no refresh logic. Need to add refresh endpoint call and auto-refresh before expiration.

next_steps.description: Add private refreshTokens() method that calls /auth/refresh with the refresh token and updates stored tokens
Add getValidToken() that checks expiresAt, auto-refreshes if within 60 seconds of expiration, returns valid access token

arguments.summary: Added token refresh: refreshTokens() calls /auth/refresh endpoint, isExpiringSoon() checks if within buffer, getValidToken() auto-refreshes if needed. TypeScript compiles.
arguments.final_answer:
Added JWT refresh to src/auth.ts:
- refreshTokens(): POST /auth/refresh with refresh token
- isExpiringSoon(): checks if within configurable buffer (default 60s)
- getValidToken(): auto-refreshes before returning access token
- Error handling for unauthenticated and failed refresh states
- TypeScript compiles cleanly
